name: OpenLibrary — full regression roundtrip
description: Showcases: full lifecycle, context passing (store → delta assert), and two assertion modes (delta and absolute). Clear → store baseline → add → assert delta → clear again → assert absolute 0.

steps.description: Step 1: Wipe shelf to a known-zero state
Step 2: Store baseline — must be 0 after clear
Step 4: Add all collected books to want-to-read shelf
Step 5: Assert shelf grew by {{limit}} from baseline (delta mode — uses stored count_before)
Step 6: Wipe shelf again — second clear to test idempotent teardown
Step 7: Assert shelf is back to exactly 0 (absolute mode — no context lookup needed)
